name: Clicking the "Sauce" link in the footer About Us section navigates to the Sauce external site

steps.name: Given  I am on the Sauce Demo homepage
When  I click the "Sauce" link in the footer About Us section
Then  the link destination should be "http://sauceapp.io"

labels.name: story
labels.value: Clicking the "Sauce" link in the footer About Us section navigates to the Sauce external site

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Clicking the "Sauce" link in the footer About Us section navigates to the Sauce external site
